summary: Added Apple-native Localizable.strings resources for 19 approved locales, wired them through the Owlory app target with a PBXVariantGroup, and added localization parity validation to the repo harness and architecture checks.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-localization-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Owlory had no first-class localization resource set: no *.lproj folders, no Localizable.strings files, no PBXVariantGroup, and Xcode knownRegions contained only en and Base.
contract_status_changes.after: Owlory has Localizable.strings resources for all 19 approved locales under Owlory/Resources, Xcode knownRegions names every locale canonically, and the app Resources phase packages the Localizable.strings PBXVariantGroup rather than raw lproj folders.
proof: xcodebuild build -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-localization-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: There was no repo-level check proving that locale folders used canonical Apple names, matched English keys, or stayed packaged as Xcode localized resources.
contract_status_changes.after: Tools/localization-parity.sh verifies the approved locale set, key parity against en.lproj, unexpected lproj folders, PBXVariantGroup packaging, raw-folder resource copy regressions, and knownRegions coverage; make architecture invokes it.

residual_risks: All non-English locales intentionally retain English placeholder values in this foundation slice; real translation review remains future work.
The source key set covers common visible navigation, tab, empty-state, button, section, and action copy but does not exhaustively replace every hardcoded or interpolated user-facing string.
The unsigned simulator build passed with one pre-existing TodayView onChange deprecation warning unrelated to localization.
recommended_next_reason: The foundation resources and parity guardrail are now in place. A separate narrow slice can audit remaining hardcoded visible copy and dynamic interpolation keys without mixing resource packaging with broad UI edits.
